---
title: "Monte Carlo Exercises"
---

## Question 1

```{r}
f<- function(x) exp((-x^2/2)*sin(2*x)^2)
curve(f,-5, 5, main = expression(paste('Plot of ', f(x)== e^(-x^2/2 )*sin(2*x)^2)),xlab='x',ylab='f(x)', sub='Plot of the f(x) on [-5,5]' )
```

```{r}
f<- function(x) exp((-x^2/2)*sin(2*x)^2)
curve(f,-5, 5)
g <- function(x) 10*dnorm(x)
curve(g, add = TRUE)
```

```{r}


```

## Question 2

```{r}
x<- rexp(N,rate = 2)

```

## Question 7

```{r}

```
